headline: Does McDonald’s Sub-US$3 Value Push Reshape the Bull Case For MCD’s Margin Story?
summary: In recent weeks, McDonald’s has rolled out a refreshed U.S. value push, including sub-US$3 menu items, a US$4 breakfast deal, and a revamped low-priced beverage lineup, to appeal to cost-conscious diners amid weaker consumer sentiment and higher living costs. These changes highlight how McDonald’s is using pricing, menu innovation, and specialty drinks to balance customer traffic needs against margin pressure as inflation and fuel costs weigh on household budgets. headline: Selling A Spread On McDonald's Stock Could Deliver A Big Mac-Sized Return
summary: McDonald's stock is oversold but it may not drop much more. Selling this options spread aims to generate a 19% return in five months.

headline: Rothschild & Co Upgrades McDonald's to Neutral, Raises Price Target to $306
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Chris Luyckx    upgrades McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) from Sell to Neutral and raises the price target from $260 to $306.

headline: McDonald's added a lot of new U.S. restaurants in 2025
summary: The fast-food giant opened more locations in the U.S. in 2025 than in any year since 2002, ending the brand's low-growth era
